(ii) के 瀡त瀓भ (2) म犆, िव獸मान 灹िवि玗य犘 के 瀡थान पर, िन玈िलिखत 灹िवि玗यां रखी जाएंगी, अथा榁त् : — “आयुध िनयम, 2016 के िनयम 2 के उप-िनयम (1) के खंड (51) के अधीन यथा प琇रभािषत 12.7 िममी. तक के 玐ास के लघु आयुध犘 से िभ玂 आयुध और गोला-बा牲द तथा र楹ा उप瀡कर क琉 सहब獳 मद犆 और ऐसे आयुध犘 के िलए गोला-बा牲द ।”। [फा. सं. V-11026/184/2018-आयुध] एस.सी.एल. दास, संयु猴 सिचव 琇ट瀉पण : मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजप灴, असाधारण, भाग II, खंड 3, उपखंड (ii) म犆 का.आ. 6203(अ) तारीख 14 琈दस瀓बर, 2018 獧ारा 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी । -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 2nd April, 2019 S.O. 1501(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 43 of the Arms Act, 1959 (54 of 1959), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendments in the Government of India Ministry of Home Affairs notification No. S.O. 6203 (E) dated 14th December, 2018, published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (ii), dated the 14th December, 2018 namely:— In the said notification, in the SCHEDULE, in serial no. (ii), in Column (2) for the existing entries, the following entries shall be substituted, namely:— “Arms and ammunition and allied items of defence equipment; other than small arms of caliber upto 12.7 mm as defined under clause (51) of Sub-rule (1) of rule 2 of the Arms Rules, 2016 and ammunition for such arms.”. [F. No.V-11026/184/2018-Arms] S.C.L. DAS, Jt. Secy. Note: Principal Notification was published in the gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii) vide S.O. 6203 (E) dated the 14th December, 2018.
